summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Telegram bot e-commerce system. All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed), frontend functionality, and Telegram bot integration working perfectly. System includes 6 sample products, proper CRUD operations, statistics dashboard, and real-time order management.
passed_tests: Products CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Frontend page loading (all pages load without errors)
Products page functionality (create, edit, list products)
Orders page functionality (statistics, filtering, empty state)
Statistics page (charts, metrics, low stock alerts)
